activation_mode.mechanism: Zed rule files load unconditionally when present at project root; no conditional activation syntax documented

auto_memory.mechanism: Zed does not document a command that persists agent memory into the rules file

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: Zed discovers rule files from multiple providers at project root using a priority-ordered list: .rules, .cursorrules, .windsurfrules, .clinerules, .github/copilot-instructions.md, AGENT.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md — the first matching file wins

file_imports.mechanism: no import directive documented for Zed's .rules file

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Zed loads rule files from the project root only; no multi-tier hierarchical loading documented

providerExtensions.name: Cross-provider rule file recognition
providerExtensions.summary: At project root, Zed recognizes a priority-ordered list of rule filenames from multiple providers: .rules (preferred), .cursorrules, .windsurfrules, .clinerules, .github/copilot-instructions.md, AGENT.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md. The first matching file is used.

providerExtensions.name: Rules Library editor
providerExtensions.summary: Zed provides a dedicated Rules Library editor (agent panel > ... > Rules..., or cmd-alt-l on macOS / ctrl-alt-l on Windows/Linux) with syntax highlighting, inline assistant support, title editing from the editor title bar, and duplicate/delete controls.

providerExtensions.name: Default rules (paper clip icon)
providerExtensions.summary: Any rule in the Rules Library can be set as default by clicking the paper clip icon, making it automatically included in every new Agent Panel interaction. Default rules are managed through the Rules Library UI.
